message:
update beads issue tracker with enriched acceptance criteria and verification gates

Refresh all 260 open beads with mandatory verification gates, structured
logging requirements, and deterministic e2e/unit test checklists. Adds
tooling contracts (asupersync/frankentui) and closure evidence fields
across all tracked issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
